title: SafeChest
description: Never lose your items again! SafeChest automatically saves your inventory in a protected chest when you die. Teleport or fetch it back with simple commands.
body:
---

## ЁЯУж SafeChest v0.0.5 тАФ The Ultimate Player Safety & Server Management System

> **Tired of losing everything when you die?** SafeChest automatically saves your entire inventory, armor, and off-hand item into a chest at your death location. Recover it easily тАФ no more rage-quitting after falling into lava!
>
> **Version 0.0.5 is a REVOLUTION.** WeтАЩve added professional admin tools, sound effects, animated holograms, PlaceholderAPI integration, pagination, live GUI updates, and fixed critical performance bugs. This isnтАЩt just a Death Chest plugin тАФ itтАЩs the **ultimate safety net and server management suite** for your players and staff.

---

## тЬи Key Features тАФ v0.0.5 Edition

ЁЯЫбя╕П **Auto-Protection & Anti-Griefing**  
Only you (or admins) can open or break your chest. Configurable protection from entity/block explosions. **Breaking your own chest now instantly restores your inventory тАФ no more misclicks!**

тП│ **Live Multi-Line Animated Hologram Timer**  
Floating display shows your name, item count, and real-time countdown. **Survives server restarts.**  
тЬи **NEW:** Holograms now **blink in red/yellow** when time is running out (configurable threshold and colors).  
тЬи **NEW:** Option to blink **only the `{time}` placeholder** for subtle, elegant alerts.

ЁЯзн **`/sctp` тАФ Teleport to Chest (Index Support)**  
One click, and youтАЩre back at your death spot. Use `/sctp 2` to teleport to a specific chest from your list. Configurable "force teleport" if no safe spot is found.  
ЁЯФК **NEW:** Play a configurable sound on teleport.

ЁЯз▓ **`/scfetch` тАФ Bring Chest to You**  
Perfect for deaths in the void, lava, or caves. The chest (and its hologram) move with you.  
ЁЯФК **NEW:** Play a configurable sound on fetch.

ЁЯСБя╕П **`/scpreview` тАФ Live Peek Inside (Auto-Refresh & Close Button)**  
View chest contents without moving тАФ safe and read-only. Fully customizable GUI.  
тЬи **NEW:** GUI **auto-refreshes every 5 seconds** from the database. If the chest expires while youтАЩre viewing it, the GUI closes automatically.  
тЬи **NEW:** Dedicated **BARRIER close button** in slot 44 for explicit closure.

ЁЯУЛ **`/sclist` тАФ All Active Chests (With Pagination!)**  
Clickable list of all your chests. Teleport to any instantly. Sort by time, filter by world, show UUIDs.  
тЬи **NEW:** Results are now **paginated (5 per page)** with clickable `[Previous]` and `[Next]` buttons. Use `/sclist 3` to jump to page 3.

ЁЯТ░ **Vault Economy Support (With Logging)**  
Charge players for `/sctp` or `/scfetch` тАФ configurable per group. Action Bar feedback on payment.  
ЁЯУЭ **NEW:** All payments and chest interactions are now **logged to the server console** for auditing and debugging.

ЁЯСе **Group-Based Configuration (With Custom Chest Materials!)**  
Define custom rules for `default`, `vip`, `admin` тАФ different durations, limits, prices, **and even chest materials** (e.g., VIPs get Barrels, Admins get Shulker Boxes).  
> ЁЯТб Players are assigned to the **first group** they have permission for.

ЁЯТм **Interactive Death Messages (With Dynamic Cost & Time)**  
After dying, get clickable buttons: **[TP]**, **[FETCH]**, **[PREVIEW]**. **Fully configurable per button.**  
тЬи **NEW:** Hover text for buttons now shows **dynamic placeholders** like `{cost}` and `{time}`. Example: `"Cost: 50 coins. Expires in: 2m 30s."`

ЁЯТ╛ **Persistence & Auto-Restoration**  
Supports **SQLite or MySQL** storage. **Chests and holograms are restored on server start.**  
тЪая╕П **IMPORTANT:** Table name changed from `angelchests` to `safechests` тАФ **manual migration required** on update.

тЪЩя╕П **Ultra-Configurable**  
Control **everything**: particle types, action bar messages, GUI titles, button visibility, world restrictions, explosion protection, **sounds, hologram animations, and much more** тАФ all editable in `config.yml`.

ЁЯФД **`/safechestreload`**  
Reload configs without restarting the server тАФ essential for live admins. Safer than `/reload`.

ЁЯОи **Visual & Audio Feedback**  
тЭдя╕П Configurable particles on creation. тЬи Configurable particles on recovery. Optional Action Bar messages.  
ЁЯФК **NEW:** Configurable **sounds** on creation, restore, teleport, and expiration.

ЁЯМР **Multi-World Support**  
Enable or disable the plugin in specific worlds. Filter `/sclist` to show only the current world.  
тЬи **IMPROVED:** Configuration now uses `behavior.disabled-worlds` (a blacklist) for clearer logic.

ЁЯза **PlaceholderAPI Integration**  
тЬи **BRAND NEW:** Use placeholders like `%safechest_time_left%`, `%safechest_item_count%`, `%safechest_location%` in **any plugin that supports PlaceholderAPI** (scoreboards, chat, menus, etc.).

ЁЯЫая╕П **Admin Command Suite (`/safechestadmin`)**  
тЬи **BRAND NEW:** A powerful toolkit for server staff:
*   `inspect <player>`: List all active chests for a player (click to teleport).
*   `delete <uuid>`: Delete a specific chest by its UUID.
*   `purge`: Manually purge all expired chests from the database.
*   `stats`: Show server-wide statistics (total active/expired chests, players with chests, etc.).

тЪая╕П **Critical Bug Fixes:**
*   **ЁЯРЮ Fixed: Deadlock on Chest Interaction/Breaking** тАФ No more server freezes when clicking or breaking chests. Operations are now fully asynchronous.
*   **ЁЯРЮ Fixed: Hologram Timer Inactive on Restart** тАФ Holograms now start their countdown timer correctly after a server reboot.
*   **ЁЯРЮ Fixed: Economy Errors Not Logged** тАФ Payment failures are now logged to the server console for easy debugging.

---

## ЁЯУШ Wiki: How to Use SafeChest v0.0.5

### ЁЯзн 1. Basic Usage (For Players)

#### ЁЯТА When You Die
- A chest will automatically appear at your death location.
- All your items (inventory, armor, off-hand) are stored inside.
- YouтАЩll receive a **configurable** chat message with clickable buttons:
  - **[TP]** тЖТ `/sctp` тАФ Teleports you to the chest. Hover shows cost and time remaining.
  - **[FETCH]** тЖТ `/scfetch` тАФ Brings the chest to you. Hover shows cost and time remaining.
  - **[PREVIEW]** тЖТ `/scpreview` тАФ Shows chest contents without moving. Hover shows time remaining.

#### ЁЯУе To Recover Your Items
- **Walk to the chest** and **right-click it** to restore your inventory.
- Or use **`/sctp`** to teleport to it.
- Or use **`/scfetch`** to bring it to you.

#### ЁЯСА Preview Your Chest (No Movement Needed)
```bash
/scpreview
```
- Opens a virtual inventory showing all your stored items.
- Completely safe тАФ you canтАЩt take or modify anything.
- The GUI **updates live** every 5 seconds. If the chest expires, the GUI closes automatically.
- Click the **red BARRIER** in the bottom row to close it manually.

#### ЁЯУЛ List All Your Active Chests (Paginated!)
```bash
/sclist
```
- Shows all your active chests in pages of 5.
- **Configurable**: Filter by current world, sort by expiration time, show UUID in hover.
- Click any entry to teleport directly to that chest (if you have permission).
- Use `/sclist 2` to jump to page 2.

---

### тЪЩя╕П 2. Configuration (For Server Admins)

#### ЁЯУБ Files You Can Customize

- `config.yml` тАФ **Main settings**: storage, chest material, hologram text, particle types, death message buttons, GUI options, world restrictions, explosion protection, **sounds, hologram animations, logging, and much more**.
- `groups.yml` тАФ Define player groups (e.g., `default`, `vip`, `admin`) with custom durations, chest limits, command prices, **and chest materials**.
- `lang.yml` тАФ Translate or customize every message in the plugin, including **new messages for pagination, admin commands, and logging**.

#### ЁЯОп Example: Creating a VIP Group

In `groups.yml`:

```yaml
vip:
  safechest-duration: 600      # 10 minutes
  max-allowed-safechests: 10   # Can have up to 10 active chests
  price-teleport: 50.0         # Costs 50 coins to teleport
  price-fetch: 100.0           # Costs 100 coins to fetch
  material: "BARREL"           # тЬЕ NEW: VIPs get Barrels instead of Chests!
```

Then, give players the permission:  
`safechest.group.vip`

> ЁЯТб Players are assigned to the **first group** they have permission for.

#### ЁЯЦЛя╕П Customizing the Hologram & Death Message

In `config.yml`:

```yaml
angelchest:
  hologram-text: "&a&l[SafeChest]&r\n&b{player}\n&7{items} items / {time}"

# тЬЕ NEW SECTION: HOLOGRAM ANIMATION
hologram-animation:
  enabled: true
  threshold-seconds: 10 # Start blinking when 10 seconds or less remain
  color-on: "RED"
  color-off: "YELLOW"
  blink-only-time-placeholder: true # Only blink the {time} part

death-message:
  enabled: true
  show-buttons: true
  show-button-tp: true
  show-button-fetch: false # Disable fetch globally
  show-button-preview: true
```

Placeholders (for `hologram-text`, `lang.yml`, and death message hovers):
- `{player}` тАФ PlayerтАЩs name.
- `{items}` тАФ Total number of items in the chest.
- `{time}` тАФ Time remaining until expiration.
- `{cost}` тАФ Cost of the action (for death message hovers).

> тЬЕ **Multi-line holograms are now fully supported and restored on server restart.**

#### ЁЯОо Customizing the Player Experience

In `config.yml`:

```yaml
messages:
  use-action-bar: true # Show "Chest Created!" in action bar instead of chat
  use-particles: true
  particle-on-create: "HEART"
  particle-on-restore: "END_ROD"

# тЬЕ NEW SECTION: SOUNDS
sounds:
  enabled: true
  on-create: "ENTITY_PLAYER_LEVELUP"
  on-restore: "ENTITY_ENDERMAN_TELEPORT"
  on-teleport: "ENTITY_ENDERMAN_TELEPORT"
  on-expire: "ENTITY_ITEM_BREAK"

commands:
  preview-gui:
    title: "&6My Items - SafeChest" # Change the GUI title
    info-item-material: "BOOK" # Change the info item
    force-close-only-with-esc: true # Only close preview with ESC key

  aclist:
    show-only-current-world: true # Only show chests in the player's current world
    sort-by-expiration: true # Show expiring chests first
    show-uuid-in-hover: false # Hide UUID (useful for debugging if true)
```

#### ЁЯЫбя╕П Advanced Behavior Control

In `config.yml`:

```yaml
behavior:
  # тЬЕ RENAMED: From 'enabled-worlds' to 'disabled-worlds'
  disabled-worlds: ["world_the_end"] # Disable plugin in The End
  protect-from-entity-explosions: true # Protect from Creepers
  protect-from-block-explosions: false # Allow TNT to destroy chests
  force-clear-drops-on-death: true # Fix double-drop bug
```

---

### ЁЯТ░ 3. Economy Setup

SafeChest integrates with **Vault**. Make sure you have a compatible economy plugin installed (e.g., EssentialsX, CMI).

#### ЁЯТ╡ Charging for Commands

In `groups.yml` or `config.yml`, set prices:

```yaml
price-teleport: 50.0
price-fetch: 100.0
```

Players will be charged automatically when using `/sctp` or `/scfetch`.

> тЬЕ If Vault is not installed, these features are silently disabled тАФ no errors. (`softdepend: [Vault]`).

---

### ЁЯФД 4. Reloading Configurations

As an admin, you can reload all configurations **without restarting the server**:

```bash
/safechestreload
```

**Required Permission:** `safechest.reload`

This command:
- Reloads `config.yml`, `groups.yml`, and `lang.yml`.
- Clears expired chests from cache.
- Reinitializes the plugin container.
- **Does NOT break active chests or holograms.**

> ЁЯЪл **Warning:** Avoid using `/reload` during heavy server activity. `/safechestreload` is much safer.

---

### ЁЯЫбя╕П 5. Permissions (Renamed!)

| Permission | Description | Default |
|------------|-------------|---------|
| `safechest.use` | Allows using the Death Chest system | `true` |
| `safechest.protect` | Allows protecting your chest from others | `true` |
| `safechest.protect.ignore` | Allows opening SafeChests protected of other players | `op` |
| `safechest.tp` | Allows using `/sctp` | `true` |
| `safechest.fetch` | Allows using `/scfetch` | `true` |
| `safechest.group.<name>` | Assigns player to a group (e.g., `safechest.group.vip`) | тАФ |
| `safechest.reload` | Allows using `/safechestreload` | `op` |
| `safechest.admin` | тЬЕ **NEW:** Allows using `/safechestadmin` | `op` |

> тЬЕ Use LuckPerms, PermissionsEx, or any other permission manager to assign these.

---

### тЭУ 6. FAQ & Troubleshooting тАФ v0.0.5

**Q: Why arenтАЩt my items being saved?**  
A: Make sure you have permission `safechest.use`. Also, check if the world is **NOT** listed in `behavior.disabled-worlds` in `config.yml`.

**Q: The hologram disappeared after a restart!**  
A: **Fixed in v0.0.3 and perfected in v0.0.5!** Holograms are now automatically restored and their timers are restarted on server start. If theyтАЩre still missing, check server logs for errors.

**Q: I get тАЬInitializing... try again laterтАЭ.**  
A: The database is still loading. Wait a few seconds and try again.

**Q: Can I change the chest to a Barrel or Shulker Box?**  
A: Yes! In `config.yml`, set globally:  
```yaml
material: "BARREL"
```
Or per-group in `groups.yml`:
```yaml
vip:
  material: "SHULKER_BOX"
```

**Q: How do I disable the death message buttons?**  
A: In `config.yml`, set `death-message.show-buttons: false`, or disable individual buttons like `show-button-fetch: false`.

**Q: My players are complaining about double drops!**  
A: Enable `behavior.force-clear-drops-on-death: true` in `config.yml` to fix this.

**Q: How do I make `/sctp` work even if thereтАЩs no тАЬsafe spotтАЭ?**  
A: Set `commands.teleport-unsafe-behavior: "force"` in `config.yml`.

**Q: How do I upgrade from v0.0.4?**  
A: **CRITICAL:** You must **rename your database table** from `angelchests` to `safechests` before starting the server. Also, update all permissions and commands from `angelchest` to `safechest`.

**Q: How do I see server stats?**  
A: Use the new admin command: `/safechestadmin stats`.

**Q: How do I delete a specific chest?**  
A: Use `/safechestadmin delete <uuid>`. You can find the UUID via `/safechestadmin inspect <player>`.

---
